review_text: Recently stayed and there are a number of permament residents that engage in anti social behaviour. Could overhear foul language and racist comments about tourists staying in the park.Not a great environment especially if holidaying with kids.
Really nice place and for us the location was great.
Very good accomodation with 2 medium sized dogs
Buen lugar para acampar, cocina equipada, bbq, sala de juegos. Baños cómodos con agua caliente. Recomiendo
